{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301221563D0FAC71D29321407BF"}"},"total":114},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613741044953301784","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，人物没ooc的同时还满足了我对观影体最主要的一个要求––乐子，说实话，看观影体本来就是为了看那些观影的人的巨大反应，是那种知道未来的人看过去的人分析心里偷着笑的乐子，可以说得上是一本很不错的消遣类小说了","text_exts":[{"e":22,"s":19,"text":"观影体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774200135321407BF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227613741044953301784%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227590401590285044761%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772714020,"group_id":"7590401590285044761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6IS+ZE+c/2MTi6/vW3QIVY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6b4243d22c664f09bb90727d74e71b2b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794021&x-signature=6x%2BLZpJUz8tBMJ4utt0VnZPho1w%3D","user_id":"622777666634540","user_name":"胜平负"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"622777666634540","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590401590285044761","book_info":{"abstract":"【观影】+【聊天群】+【穿插乐子】+【奇物改变人生】+【主角工具人】
林烁觉醒了共鸣点系统。
为了获得奖励，他决定把末王的活儿牛过来——
给与所有人充分了解自己命运的权利！
俗称剧透。
自此，史诗中的英雄，和各怀哲学的反派登上红黑榜，依照评级获奖，奔赴各自的命运。
白厄：那是谁？毁灭星神？那我呢？我一拳打落了净世金血！奖励天火圣裁？
三月七：威风八面杀气飘，黑伞撑起娃娃摇。天啊，这简直就是我！这奖励是什么？宿伞之魂，所有灵魂全都怕我？
黑天鹅：什么叫我除了瘪以外，什么都没吃过。获得“指路冥灯”称号，奖励未来放映机，看广告播放未来？那也不是不行。
飞霄：狐人有女初长成，力拔山兮气盖世。奖励一拳超人，这什么东西，强吗？
斯科特：哈哈哈，我孤狼也上榜了？看来我注定干出一番大事业！这什么奖励？烈焰苏打臭豆腐浓豆汁（威力加强版）。吃了增长智慧？我喝！呕~~！这鬼东西根本不是人喝的吧？
林烁：诶！这不就增长智慧了吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a5fa56829b39f0e6080049d0d35d4e2e","author":"日月掩春秋","author_id":"","book_id":"7590401590285044761","book_name":"崩铁群聊：红黑榜镌刻英雄史诗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c890b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590673935994208793","read_count":"73525","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"336917"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"159","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,直播,聊天群,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6b3d9a3787e1cf708a279c0c00342448~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384135&x-signature=sCzZ%2BdhKu%2Bbp8Zt4iNF17345Brg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3993846347742157","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"319"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301221563D0FAC71D29321407BF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
